source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/05_설계개발 검증 및 유효성 확인/06_Risk Management/A-TCF-5-105 FMEA Table (rev.2).xlsx

sourceSummary.oneLine: FMEA Report A-TCF-5-105 Rev. 2 for Digital faly panel X-ray detector models A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports risk management, usability, cybersecurity, and RED-related verification evidence for the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
keyPoints: The report is aligned to EN ISO 14971:2019, IEC 60601-1:2006/AMD1:2013, EN 62366-1:2015, and Radio Equipment Directive requirements.
The revision history states Rev. 2 dated 2024.03.08 was a response to 2nd review by 3EC (NB).
Overall residual risks are stated to be acceptable after implemented and verified risk control measures.
Risk controls include labels, user manual information, certified battery use, IEC 60601-1 testing, IEC 62304 software development process, radio-related testing, and certified RF module use.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: The H&abyz Co., Ltd. figured out the intended purpose and the characteristics related to the safety of the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

entities.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
entities.evidence: risk management activities for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector (A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW)

concepts.name: Risk Management Process
concepts.pageTarget: Risk Management Process for ME Equipment
concepts.evidence: 4.2,Risk Management Process for ME Equipment or ME Systems,A,See Risk Management Report (Doc. No. A-TCF-5-104).

concepts.name: Essential performance
concepts.evidence: Manufacturer shall identify which functions are Essential Performance.

concepts.name: Expected service life
concepts.evidence: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW is designed for a service life of approximately 5 years.

concepts.name: Type B Applied part
concepts.evidence: 8.5.2.2,Type B applied parts,A,Type B Applied part

concepts.name: Software development process
concepts.evidence: Software development process was established in compliance with IEC 62304 and software validation was perform.

concepts.name: Cybersecurity WiFi login
concepts.evidence: SRS-C-1,WiFi Login,A,Restrict random access by setting id / pw when connecting to Wires network

concepts.name: Transmission data encryption
concepts.evidence: Transmission data is protected by applying encryption such as WPA, WPAPSK, WPA2, WPA2PSK, WPAPSK+TKIP, etc.

concepts.name: Radio Equipment Directive Article 3.1a
concepts.evidence: Article 3.1a,the protection of health and safety of persons and of domestic animals and the protection of property

concepts.name: Radio Equipment Directive Article 3.1b
concepts.evidence: Article 3.1b,an adequate level of electromagnetic compatibility as set out in Directive 2014/30/EU.

concepts.name: Radio Equipment Directive Article 3.2
concepts.evidence: Article 3.2,Radio equipment shall be so constructed that it both effectively uses and supports the efficient use of radio spectrum in order to avoid harmful interference.

evidence.claim: The document is FMEA Report A-TCF-5-105 Rev. 2.
The document applies to models A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Models

evidence.claim: The product is identified as a Digital faly panel X-ray detector in the header.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name,:,Digital faly panel X-ray detector

evidence.claim: The listed standards include EN ISO 14971:2019, IEC 60601-1:2006/AMD1:2013, EN 62366-1:2015, and Radio Equipment Directive (RED).
evidence.evidenceText: Standard,:,EN ISO 14971:2019 + IEC 60601-1:2006/AMD1:2013 + EN 62366-1:2015 + Radio Equipment Directive (RED)

evidence.claim: Rev. 2 was issued in response to the 2nd review by 3EC (NB).
The expected service life is approximately 5 years.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW is designed for a service life of approximately 5 years.

evidence.claim: The device has a rechargeable battery.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW has the rechargeable battery.

evidence.claim: The device has data cable, ethernet cable, AC power cord, trigger cable, and USB cable.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW has the data cable, ethernet cable, AC power cord, Trigger cable, USB cable.

evidence.claim: The device does not have patient leads or patient cables.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW does not have the patient lead or patient cable.

evidence.claim: The device does not have moving parts.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW does not have moving parts.

evidence.claim: The device does not produce diagnostic or therapeutic X-radiation.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW does not produce the x-radiation for diagnostic or therapeutic purposes.

evidence.claim: Software risk controls reference IEC 62304 and software validation.
evidence.evidenceText: Software risk management process was established in compliance with IEC 62304 and software validation was performed.

evidence.claim: Cybersecurity controls include ID/password restriction for wireless network connection.
evidence.evidenceText: Restrict random access by setting id / pw when connecting to Wireless network

evidence.claim: Cybersecurity controls include wireless transmission data encryption.
evidence.evidenceText: Protect the transmission data by applying encryption such as WPA, WPAPSK, WPA2, WPA2PSK, WPAPSK+TKIP, etc.

evidence.claim: RED Article 3.1a risk control relies on certified RF module, RED testing, and IEC 60601-1 testing.
evidence.evidenceText: The device is designed using certified RF module, and RED test was performed. Also, performed IEC 60601-1 test.

evidence.claim: RED Article 3.1b is addressed through electromagnetic compatibility design, EMC testing, and user manual information.
evidence.evidenceText: There is no unacceptable risk as the EMC test has satisfied basic safety in normal condition and single fault condition and we provide information on electromagnetic compatibility in user manual.

evidence.claim: RED Article 3.2 is addressed through use of an RF module compliant with RED Directive and harmonised standards.
evidence.evidenceText: Using RF Module compliant with RED Directive and harmonised standards.

evidence.claim: Overall residual risks are determined acceptable after risk controls are implemented and verified.
evidence.evidenceText: After all risk control measures have been implemented and verified, the residual risks within the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector are reduced in the acceptable region

reviewFlags.reason: Source text has extraction/OCR quality issues and typographical errors, including 'Digital faly panel X-ray detector', 'hazzards', 'measeres', and malformed table cells.
Authority signal is 'general' while the source also contains a Radio Equipment Directive (RED) section and RED-related evidence.
Manufacturer appears in a body statement as H&abyz Co., Ltd. but is not presented in the document header metadata.
